seoTitle: Carrs Peninsula vs Cartwright — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Carrs Peninsula and Cartwright. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Carrs Peninsula vs Cartwright: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Carrs Peninsula and Cartwright.
heading: Carrs Peninsula vs Cartwright — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Carrs Peninsula, New South Wales and Cartwright, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Carrs Peninsula has a lower overall climate risk score (35/100) compared to Cartwright (45/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Carrs Peninsula or Cartwright safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Carrs Peninsula has a flood risk score of 46/100, while Cartwright scores 55/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Carrs Peninsula scores 35/100 for bushfire risk. Cartwright scores 51/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Carrs Peninsula or Cartwright?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Carrs Peninsula has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.17% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
